title: Iran says it received US response to 14-point proposal via Pakistan — reviewing reply
snippet: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesperson confirmed that the US has responded to Iran's 14-point proposal via Pakistan, and Tehran is now reviewing Washington's reply. The exchange represents the first formal response cycle since Iran submitted its counter-proposal. The 14-point plan demands war resolution within 30 days (vs US 2-month proposal), including nonaggression guarantees, sanctions relief, withdrawal, frozen assets, reparations, Lebanon end-of-hostilities, and new Hormuz mechanism.
tag_reason: Iran confirming receipt of US formal response via Pakistan is a new development — shifts from 'reviewing' to active response exchange
